items.question: How accurate are your practice tests compared to the real CCAT?
items.answer: Our simulations are engineered to be 98% identical to the actual Criteria Cognitive Aptitude Test. We match the question distribution (Verbal, Numerical, Spatial), the strict 15-minute timer, and the difficulty level based on feedback from thousands of successful test-takers.

items.question: Can I cancel my Pro subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your Pro subscription at any time with no penalty. You'll retain access to Pro features until the end of your billing period.

items.question: Do you offer a score guarantee?
items.answer: We're confident in our platform. Candidates who complete at least 5 full simulations and all personalized drills see an average improvement of 15+ percentile points.

items.question: What is the "Diagnostic Test"?
items.answer: The free Diagnostic Test is a full-length, 50-question, 15-minute simulation that mirrors the real CCAT. After completing it, you receive a baseline score report showing your performance across Verbal, Numerical, and Spatial categories.
